svg.text: ARTIST 4 CAST. EIGHT LETTERS IN ONE ALPHABET
I / ? / H / A / E / o=o / Q / V. Vertical notches are affordable, lateral ones are not. Judge the silhouette rows at the bottom.
SIZE LADDER. 18 / 32 / 44 / 64 px tall, frame 1 then frame 2. Game draws at 32, dock at 18.
4x INSPECTION. Editing only. No creature here was approved from this row.
FOUR PLAYER COLORS x THREE BACKGROUNDS, ALL EIGHT SPECIES, ALL AT 32 px. True game size.
Hard case: green #3aaa18 on green terrain, middle block, third column. The white halo carries it.
DOCK BADGE ROW. The head crop symbols at 18 px, the size the auction dock actually draws.
THE ACCEPTANCE TEST. All eight as pure black shapes. Order: humanoid gollumer mechtron packer leggite bonzoid spheroid flapper.
frame 1 at 18 px. This row is the gate.
frame 1 at 64 px, for reading the letter shapes
